title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: A tutorial video on using AWS CDK with Python to build a serverless REST API by defining infrastructure as code. The video compares manual AWS console setup against CDK automation and covers DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway deployment.
